title: [DE] Help
description: [DE] Find guides, tutorials, and answers to help you get the most out of doseo.
noResults: [DE] No articles found matching your search.
tourWelcomeContent: [DE] This is your SEO monitoring dashboard. Let us show you around!
tourAddDomainContent: [DE] Start by adding a domain to monitor. Click here to add your first website.
tourAddKeywordsContent: [DE] Add the keywords you want to track. You can add them manually or use AI suggestions.
tourViewPositionsContent: [DE] Track your keyword positions over time. See rankings, changes, and trends.
tourCheckCompetitorsContent: [DE] Add competitors to compare their rankings with yours across all your keywords.
tourReportsNavContent: [DE] Access your reports section from the navigation menu.
tourGenerateReportContent: [DE] Create comprehensive SEO reports with customizable sections.
tourCustomizeReportContent: [DE] Choose which sections to include and customize the report appearance.
tourExportReportContent: [DE] Export reports as PDF, CSV, or share them with clients via a link.
tourOrgSettingsContent: [DE] Manage your organization details, billing, and subscription plan.
tourBrandingContent: [DE] Upload your logo and customize the appearance of shared reports.
tourTeamContent: [DE] Invite team members and manage their roles and permissions.
tourNotificationsContent: [DE] Configure which notifications you receive and how often.
